description_long: This is a whole red onion with a deep purplish-red outer skin, displaying a rounded, slightly flattened bulb shape. The surface is covered in a thin, papery layer that is mostly intact, with some minor peeling and fibrous remnants near the base. The top of the onion features a dried, twisted stem remnant, while the base shows a small, fibrous root tuft with a few dried root strands. The skin has a matte, slightly rough texture with subtle sheen and visible striations running from top to bottom. No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible, and the onion appears fresh and uncut, suitable for culinary use or as urban food waste.
description: A whole red onion with a mostly intact papery skin, dried stem, and small root tuft, showing a deep purplish-red color and rounded bulb shape.
description_view_0: The onion is seen with its dried stem at the top and a visible root tuft with fibrous strands at the base, showing the most intact papery skin.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rounded side of the onion, with the stem more prominent and the root tuft less visible, showing a smooth, continuous surface.
description_view_2: The onion's side is shown with a slight crease and the papery skin appearing slightly more wrinkled, with the root tuft just visible at the bottom edge.
description_view_3: The back of the onion is visible, with the stem at the top and a small section of the papery skin slightly peeled, root tuft barely visible.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with no distinct lobes or segments visible; the surface is smooth and rounded.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact, covering the entire bulb with minor peeling at the base and top; it is deep red to purplish in color and has a matte, slightly rough texture.
attribute_root_tuft: A small root tuft is present at the base, with a few short, dried, light brown root strands visible.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: No urban elements or context are visible; the onion appears isolated on a plain, featureless background.
